title: Warm up
content: The slide features images representing three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. It visually introduces various transportation scenarios and technological contexts in each city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide is titled 'AN EVOLVING NATION' with a subtitle 'A Ride Through China'. It highlights images of taxis and architectural landmarks from various Chinese cities.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines a process of investigation and research, focusing on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide connects Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou to specific development strategies: technology & tradition integration, sustainable urban development, and tourism & economic growth respectively.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide explores different development strategies seen through the perspective of taxi drivers. It emphasizes how each city's unique strategies are tailored to enhance development aligned with local features.
